flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Atlanta Technical College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (28.6% → 21.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Atlanta Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Atlanta Technical College fell 32% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.0k → $9.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Atlanta Technical College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 3.9k).
